input: During the last hospital visit, what are the 4 most common drugs given alongside <DRUG>19041823</DRUG>?
output: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_19041823 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 19041823), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_19041823 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 19041823) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 4;

input: Which three diagnoses were most frequent in the elderly (60+) population last month?
output: SELECT co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN person AS p ON co.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE date_part('year', age(co.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) >= 60 AND co.condition_start_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND co.condition_start_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3;

input: How is the value 1.3 positioned percentile-wise in <MEASUREMENT>3022217</MEASUREMENT> among those the same age as patient <PERSON_ID>4924550704026979905</PERSON_ID> in March last year?
output: WITH reference_patient AS (SELECT p.person_id, DATE_PART('year', AGE(MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1), p.birth_datetime)) AS age FROM person AS p WHERE p.person_id = 4924550704026979905), patients_same_age AS (SELECT p.person_id FROM person AS p JOIN reference_patient r ON DATE_PART('year', AGE(MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1), p.birth_datetime)) = r.age), march_last_year_measurements AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN patients_same_age AS pa ON m.person_id = pa.person_id WHERE m.measurement_concept_id = 3022217 AND m.measurement_date >= MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1) AND m.measurement_date < MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 4, 1) AND m.value_as_number IS NOT NULL), ranked_measurements AS (SELECT mlm.value_as_number, percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY mlm.value_as_number) AS pct FROM march_last_year_measurements AS mlm) SELECT rm.pct AS percentile FROM ranked_measurements AS rm WHERE rm.value_as_number >= 1.3 ORDER BY rm.value_as_number LIMIT 1;

input: Count all patients who died the day they were diagnosed with <CONDITION>1075784</CONDITION> within 2 months.

input: At what time was the second hospital discharge for patient <PERSON_ID>2219414084045702174</PERSON_ID> from May, a year ago?
output: SELECT vo.visit_end_datetime FROM visit_occurrence AS vo WHERE vo.person_id = 2219414084045702174 AND vo.visit_end_datetime >= make_date(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 5, 1) AND vo.visit_end_datetime < make_date(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 6, 1) ORDER BY vo.visit_end_datetime OFFSET 1 LIMIT 1;

input: What are the top four prescribed drugs for women patients aged 20 to 29 within two days after being diagnosed with <CONDITION>318800</CONDITION> on this month/2?
output: WITH target_conditions AS (SELECT c.person_id, c.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS c JOIN person AS p ON p.person_id = c.person_id WHERE c.condition_concept_id = 318800 AND c.condition_start_date = MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, 2) AND p.gender_concept_id = 8532 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(c.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 20 AND 29), drug_within_2_days AS (SELECT d.drug_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS freq FROM drug_exposure AS d JOIN target_conditions AS tc ON d.person_id = tc.person_id WHERE d.drug_exposure_start_date BETWEEN tc.condition_start_date AND tc.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '2 days' GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id) SELECT dwd.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name AS drug_name, dwd.freq FROM drug_within_2_days dwd JOIN concept AS c ON c.concept_id = dwd.drug_concept_id ORDER BY dwd.freq DESC LIMIT 4;

input: What was the second most recent date on which patient <PERSON_ID>6657709864320620215</PERSON_ID> received both <DRUG>1742258</DRUG> and <DRUG>40175218</DRUG> during the first ICU visit?
output: WITH first_icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' AND vd.person_id = 6657709864320620215 ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime LIMIT 1), drug_exposures_filtered AS (SELECT de.drug_concept_id, de.drug_exposure_start_date FROM drug_exposure AS de JOIN first_icu_visit AS fiv ON de.visit_detail_id = fiv.visit_detail_id WHERE de.drug_concept_id IN (1742258, 40175218)), both_drugs_same_day AS (SELECT def.drug_exposure_start_date FROM drug_exposures_filtered AS def GROUP BY def.drug_exposure_start_date HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT def.drug_concept_id) = 2) SELECT bsd.drug_exposure_start_date FROM both_drugs_same_day AS bsd ORDER BY bsd.drug_exposure_start_date DESC OFFSET 1 LIMIT 1;

input: Count the number of patients who were diagnosed with <CONDITION>4209423</CONDITION> within 3 months after having been diagnosed with <CONDITION>437474</CONDITION> since last year.
output: WITH base_dates AS (SELECT co.person_id, co.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 437474 AND co.condition_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year'), next_condition AS (SELECT b.person_id FROM base_dates AS b JOIN condition_occurrence AS c ON b.person_id = c.person_id AND c.condition_concept_id = 4209423 AND c.condition_start_date > b.condition_start_date AND c.condition_start_date <= b.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '3 months') SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS patient_count FROM next_condition;

input: List the top 3 most common procedures for patients aged between 50 and 59 on their first hospital visit.
output: WITH first_visits AS (SELECT vo.person_id, MIN(vo.visit_occurrence_id) AS first_visit_id, MIN(vo.visit_start_date) AS first_visit_date FROM visit_occurrence AS vo GROUP BY vo.person_id), patients_50s AS (SELECT fv.first_visit_id, fv.first_visit_date FROM first_visits AS fv JOIN person AS p ON fv.person_id = p.person_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(fv.first_visit_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 50 AND 59), procedures_50s AS (SELECT pr.procedure_concept_id FROM procedure_occurrence AS pr JOIN patients_50s AS p50 ON pr.visit_occurrence_id = p50.first_visit_id) SELECT c.concept_name, p.procedure_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS procedure_count FROM procedures_50s AS p JOIN concept AS c ON p.procedure_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY p.procedure_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY procedure_count DESC LIMIT 3;

input: What are the top 5 specimens that patients have been tested up to one month after having received a <PROCEDURE>4300757</PROCEDURE> procedure while still in the hospital?
output: SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS specimen_count FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON po.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id JOIN specimen AS s ON s.person_id = po.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime >= po.procedure_datetime AND DATE_TRUNC('month', s.specimen_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', po.procedure_date) JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 4300757 AND vo.visit_type_concept_id = 32220 GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY specimen_count DESC LIMIT 5;

input: Did patient <PERSON_ID>6264555136921102118</PERSON_ID> get <DRUG>40173098</DRUG> during the first intensive unit admission?

input: How long has it been since the ICU admission of patient <PERSON_ID>1832753164987106308</PERSON_ID> in hours?

input: Up to 2203, what were the top 3 lab tests frequently done in the ICU after patients were diagnosed with <CONDITION>4229440</CONDITION>?
output: WITH icu_visits AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%'), condition_in_icu AS (SELECT co.visit_detail_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN icu_visits AS iv ON co.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 4229440 AND co.condition_start_datetime < '2204-01-01'), labs_after_condition AS (SELECT m.measurement_concept_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN condition_in_icu AS co ON m.visit_detail_id = co.visit_detail_id AND m.measurement_datetime >= co.condition_start_datetime WHERE m.measurement_datetime < '2204-01-01') SELECT c.concept_name AS test_name, l.measurement_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM labs_after_condition AS l JOIN concept AS c ON l.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY l.measurement_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3;

input: What was the most <CONDITION>316135</CONDITION> diagnoses recorded in a month during first ICU stays?
output: WITH first_icu_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vd.person_id) vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.person_id, vd.visit_detail_start_datetime), icu_diagnoses AS (SELECT co.person_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', co.condition_start_datetime) AS diagnosis_month FROM first_icu_visits AS fiv JOIN condition_occurrence AS co ON co.visit_detail_id = fiv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 316135), monthly_counts AS (SELECT icd.diagnosis_month, COUNT(DISTINCT icd.person_id) AS patient_count FROM icu_diagnoses AS icd GROUP BY icd.diagnosis_month) SELECT mc.diagnosis_month, mc.patient_count AS max_monthly_patient_count FROM monthly_counts AS mc WHERE mc.patient_count = (SELECT MAX(patient_count) FROM monthly_counts);

input: What is the name of the organism found in the <MEASUREMENT>4036044</MEASUREMENT> just before the last for patient <PERSON_ID>517101686241972750</PERSON_ID> for this calendar month?
output: WITH patient_measurements AS (SELECT m.measurement_datetime, m.value_as_concept_id FROM measurement AS m WHERE m.person_id = 517101686241972750 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 4036044 AND date_trunc('month', m.measurement_datetime) = date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)), ordered_tests AS (SELECT DISTINCT pm.measurement_datetime FROM patient_measurements AS pm ORDER BY pm.measurement_datetime DESC OFFSET 1 LIMIT 1), target_results AS (SELECT pme.value_as_concept_id FROM patient_measurements AS pme JOIN ordered_tests AS ot ON pme.measurement_datetime = ot.measurement_datetime) SELECT DISTINCT c.concept_name FROM target_results AS tr JOIN concept AS c ON tr.value_as_concept_id = c.concept_id;

output: WITH last_icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 5753387128065316976 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), second_icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN last_icu_visit AS l ON m.visit_detail_id = l.visit_detail_id WHERE m.person_id = 5753387128065316976 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 3027018 ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime OFFSET 1 LIMIT 1), first_hospital_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON m.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id WHERE m.person_id = 5753387128065316976 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 3027018 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime, m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT fhm.value_as_number AS first_hospital_value, sim.value_as_number AS second_icu_value, sim.value_as_number - fhm.value_as_number AS value_difference FROM first_hospital_measurement AS fhm CROSS JOIN second_icu_measurement AS sim;

input: What are the top three specimens collected within two weeks after a <CONDITION>441258</CONDITION> diagnosis during the last month?
output: WITH condition_occurrence_filtered AS (SELECT co.person_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 441258 AND co.condition_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month'), specimen_within_14_days AS (SELECT s.specimen_concept_id FROM specimen AS s JOIN condition_occurrence_filtered AS cof ON s.person_id = cof.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime BETWEEN cof.condition_start_datetime AND cof.condition_start_datetime + INTERVAL '14 days') SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name AS specimen_name, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM specimen_within_14_days AS s JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3;

input: Please provide the specialty of the physician in charge of a <PROCEDURE>2779573</PROCEDURE> procedure on patient <PERSON_ID>3856814790790267215</PERSON_ID> in the latest hospital visit?
output: WITH last_visit AS (SELECT vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo WHERE vo.person_id = 3856814790790267215 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT DISTINCT c.concept_name AS specialty_name FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN last_visit AS lv ON po.visit_occurrence_id = lv.visit_occurrence_id JOIN provider AS p ON po.provider_id = p.provider_id JOIN concept AS c ON p.specialty_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 2779573;

input: What are the six most reported conditions lasting over a year among patients aged in their 50s up to Jan 2187?
output: SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name AS condition_name, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM condition_era AS ce JOIN person AS p ON ce.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE ce.condition_era_start_date < DATE '2187-02-01' AND ce.condition_era_end_date > ce.condition_era_start_date + INTERVAL '1 year' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(ce.condition_era_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY condition_count DESC LIMIT 6;

input: Provide the first verbatim condition status recorded after patient <PERSON_ID>131321665335914878</PERSON_ID> completed <CONDITION>43530818</CONDITION> last month, for diagnosis <CONDITION>4049417</CONDITION>.
output: WITH diagnosis_end AS (SELECT co.condition_end_datetime AS last_end_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.person_id = 131321665335914878 AND co.condition_concept_id = 43530818 AND co.condition_end_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month' AND co.condition_end_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY co.condition_end_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), target_condition AS (SELECT con.condition_status_source_value FROM condition_occurrence AS con JOIN diagnosis_end AS de ON con.condition_start_datetime > de.last_end_datetime WHERE con.person_id = 131321665335914878 AND con.condition_concept_id = 4049417 ORDER BY con.condition_start_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT tc.condition_status_source_value FROM target_condition AS tc;

input: Count deaths attributed to <CONDITION>312327</CONDITION> in males aged 30 to 39 who underwent a <PROCEDURE>2004844</PROCEDURE> procedure prior to their death, before vs. after 2010.
output: WITH deaths_total AS (SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, d.death_datetime, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(d.death_date, p.birth_datetime)) AS age_at_death FROM death AS d JOIN person AS p ON d.person_id = p.person_id WHERE d.cause_concept_id = 312327 AND p.gender_concept_id = 8507), qualified_deaths AS (SELECT dt.death_date FROM deaths_total AS dt JOIN procedure_occurrence AS po ON dt.person_id = po.person_id AND po.procedure_concept_id = 2004844 AND po.procedure_datetime < dt.death_datetime WHERE dt.age_at_death BETWEEN 30 AND 39), death_before AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_before FROM qualified_deaths AS q WHERE q.death_date < DATE '2010-01-01'), death_after AS(SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_after FROM qualified_deaths AS qd WHERE qd.death_date >= DATE '2010-01-01') SELECT db.count_before, da.count_after, da.count_after - db.count_before AS difference FROM death_before AS db CROSS JOIN death_after AS da;

input: For patients currently in the <CAREUNIT>38004275</CAREUNIT> unit, show devices that lasted more than 3 days and stopped yesterday.

input: Retrieve the final <DRUG>1308251</DRUG> (route <DRUG_ROUTE>4156707</DRUG_ROUTE>) discontinuation date and reason for the five latest cases where a <PROCEDURE>42536500</PROCEDURE> followed.
output: WITH drug_patients AS (SELECT de.person_id, de.drug_exposure_end_date, de.drug_exposure_end_datetime, stop_reason FROM drug_exposure AS de WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 1308251 AND de.route_concept_id = 4156707), last_drug_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (drp.person_id) drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime FROM drug_patients AS drp ORDER BY drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime DESC), last_procedure_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (po.person_id) po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN drug_patients AS dp ON po.person_id = dp.person_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 42536500 ORDER BY po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime DESC), last_patients AS (SELECT lpp.person_id, ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime, lpp.procedure_datetime FROM last_procedure_patients AS lpp JOIN last_drug_patients AS ldp ON lpp.person_id = ldp.person_id WHERE lpp.procedure_datetime > ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lpp.procedure_datetime DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT dps.person_id, dps.drug_exposure_end_date, dps.stop_reason FROM drug_patients AS dps JOIN last_patients AS lp ON dps.person_id = lp.person_id WHERE dps.drug_exposure_end_datetime = lp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lp.procedure_datetime;

input: I need the instruction recorded by doctor <PROVIDER_ID>2187407720534689396</PROVIDER_ID> for prescribing <DRUG>45776699</DRUG> to <PERSON_ID>9179311870179794848</PERSON_ID> during the visit in the month of September.
output: WITH last_month_dates AS (SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) > 9 THEN DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '8 months' ELSE DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year') + INTERVAL '8 months' END AS start, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) > 9 THEN DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '9 months' ELSE DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year') + INTERVAL '9 months' END AS end), month_visits AS (SELECT vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo JOIN last_month_dates AS lmd ON vo.visit_start_date >= lmd.start AND vo.visit_start_date < lmd.end WHERE vo.person_id = 9179311870179794848) SELECT de.sig FROM drug_exposure AS de JOIN month_visits AS mv ON de.visit_occurrence_id = mv.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 45776699 AND de.provider_id = 2187407720534689396;

input: Is there a record of a parent or sibling of patient <PERSON_ID>2167816630450077</PERSON_ID> found to have condition <CONDITION>1076483</CONDITION> in the first hundred days after the patient was first diagnosed?
output: WITH parent_sibling AS (SELECT DISTINCT fr.fact_id_1 AS patient_id FROM fact_relationship AS fr WHERE fr.relationship_concept_id IN (4292398, 4232263) AND fr.fact_id_2 = 2167816630450077), patient_condition AS (SELECT co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.person_id = 2167816630450077 AND co.condition_concept_id = 1076483 ORDER BY co.condition_start_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM condition_occurrence AS co2 JOIN parent_sibling AS ps ON co2.person_id = ps.patient_id JOIN patient_condition AS pc ON co2.condition_start_datetime >= pc.condition_start_datetime AND co2.condition_start_datetime <= pc.condition_start_datetime + interval '100 days' WHERE co2.condition_concept_id = 1076483);

input: What is the patient count for deaths occurring the same day as diagnosis with <CONDITION>760529</CONDITION> in the last 14 months?

output: WITH deaths_total AS (SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, d.death_datetime, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(d.death_date, p.birth_datetime)) AS age_at_death FROM death AS d JOIN person AS p ON d.person_id = p.person_id WHERE d.cause_concept_id = 36521243 AND p.gender_concept_id = 8507), qualified_deaths AS (SELECT dt.death_date FROM deaths_total AS dt JOIN procedure_occurrence AS po ON dt.person_id = po.person_id AND po.procedure_concept_id = 4030166 AND po.procedure_datetime < dt.death_datetime WHERE dt.age_at_death BETWEEN 30 AND 39), death_before AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_before FROM qualified_deaths AS qd WHERE qd.death_date < DATE '1980-01-01'), death_after AS(SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_after FROM qualified_deaths AS qds WHERE qds.death_date >= DATE '1980-01-01') SELECT db.count_before, da.count_after, da.count_after - db.count_before AS difference FROM death_before AS db CROSS JOIN death_after AS da;

input: What is the maximum per-month number of patient records with a <CONDITION>194994</CONDITION> diagnosis on the first ICU visit?
output: WITH first_icu_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vd.person_id) vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.person_id, vd.visit_detail_start_datetime), icu_diagnoses AS (SELECT co.person_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', co.condition_start_datetime) AS diagnosis_month FROM first_icu_visits AS fiv JOIN condition_occurrence AS co ON co.visit_detail_id = fiv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 194994), monthly_counts AS (SELECT icd.diagnosis_month, COUNT(DISTINCT icd.person_id) AS patient_count FROM icu_diagnoses AS icd GROUP BY icd.diagnosis_month) SELECT mc.diagnosis_month, mc.patient_count AS max_monthly_patient_count FROM monthly_counts AS mc WHERE mc.patient_count = (SELECT MAX(patient_count) FROM monthly_counts);

input: What were the top four frequent lab tests that patients had within the same icu visit after having been diagnosed with <CONDITION>201617</CONDITION> until 2017?
output: WITH icu_visits AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%'), condition_in_icu AS (SELECT co.visit_detail_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN icu_visits AS iv ON co.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 201617 AND co.condition_start_datetime < '2018-01-01'), labs_after_condition AS (SELECT m.measurement_concept_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN condition_in_icu AS co ON m.visit_detail_id = co.visit_detail_id AND m.measurement_datetime >= co.condition_start_datetime WHERE m.measurement_datetime < '2018-01-01') SELECT c.concept_name AS test_name, l.measurement_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM labs_after_condition AS l JOIN concept AS c ON l.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY l.measurement_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 4;

input: Name six frequent conditions persisting longer than 15 years in people aged 70-79 before December 2023.
output: SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name AS condition_name, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM condition_era AS ce JOIN person AS p ON ce.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE ce.condition_era_start_date < DATE '2023-12-01' AND ce.condition_era_end_date > ce.condition_era_start_date + INTERVAL '15 years' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(ce.condition_era_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 70 AND 79 GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY condition_count DESC LIMIT 6;

input: Is the <MEASUREMENT>1176291</MEASUREMENT> recorded at 07:03:17 during patient <PERSON_ID>765501623839550755</PERSON_ID>'s initial ICU admission more than their first measurement this year?
output: WITH first_icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 765501623839550755 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime LIMIT 1), icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN first_icu_visit AS icu ON m.visit_detail_id = icu.visit_detail_id WHERE m.measurement_concept_id = 1176291 AND TO_CHAR(m.measurement_datetime, 'HH24:MI:SS') = '07:03:17' ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1), first_year_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m WHERE m.person_id = 765501623839550755 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 1176291 AND m.measurement_datetime >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT (icu.value_as_number > first.value_as_number) AS result FROM icu_measurement AS icu CROSS JOIN first_year_measurement AS first;

output: WITH first_icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 765501623839550755 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime LIMIT 1), icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN first_icu_visit AS icu ON m.visit_detail_id = icu.visit_detail_id WHERE m.measurement_concept_id = 1176291 AND TO_CHAR(m.measurement_datetime, 'HH24:MI:SS') = '07:03:17' ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1), first_year_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m WHERE m.person_id = 765501623839550755 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 1176291 AND m.measurement_datetime >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT (icu.value_as_number > first.value_as_number) AS result FROM icu_measurement AS icu CROSS JOIN first_year_measurement AS first;

input: Which doctor specialty corresponds to the physician who delivered the <PROCEDURE>763196</PROCEDURE> for patient <PERSON_ID>27565635</PERSON_ID> at first hospitalization?

input: What is the ranking percentile of a 400 result in a <MEASUREMENT>44807599</MEASUREMENT> lab test among peers of <PERSON_ID>510338714</PERSON_ID> in March last year?
output: WITH reference_patient AS (SELECT p.person_id, DATE_PART('year', AGE(MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1), p.birth_datetime)) AS age FROM person AS p WHERE p.person_id = 510338714), patients_same_age AS (SELECT p.person_id FROM person AS p JOIN reference_patient r ON DATE_PART('year', AGE(MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1), p.birth_datetime)) = r.age), march_last_year_measurements AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN patients_same_age AS pa ON m.person_id = pa.person_id WHERE m.measurement_concept_id = 44807599 AND m.measurement_date >= MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1) AND m.measurement_date < MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 4, 1) AND m.value_as_number IS NOT NULL), ranked_measurements AS (SELECT mlm.value_as_number, percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY mlm.value_as_number) AS pct FROM march_last_year_measurements AS mlm) SELECT rm.pct AS percentile FROM ranked_measurements AS rm WHERE rm.value_as_number >= 400 ORDER BY rm.value_as_number LIMIT 1;

output: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM note_nlp AS nn JOIN note AS n ON nn.note_id = n.note_id WHERE n.person_id = 3592855240882 AND nn.note_nlp_concept_id = 3578005 AND n.note_date = MAKE_DATE((EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1)::int, 3, 30)) AS concept_mentioned;

input: Highlight the seven most common intake events from the last three years.
output: SELECT de.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS intake_count FROM drug_exposure AS de JOIN concept AS c ON de.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE de.drug_exposure_start_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '36 months' GROUP BY de.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY intake_count DESC LIMIT 7;

input: What is listed as the exact condition status for the last condition status for patient <PERSON_ID>131321462355119848</PERSON_ID>'s diagnosis <CONDITION>4294192</CONDITION> following the end of <CONDITION>4198624</CONDITION> last month?
output: WITH diagnosis_end AS (SELECT co.condition_end_datetime AS last_end_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.person_id = 131321462355119848 AND co.condition_concept_id = 4198624 AND co.condition_end_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month' AND co.condition_end_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY co.condition_end_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), target_condition AS (SELECT con.condition_status_source_value FROM condition_occurrence AS con JOIN diagnosis_end AS de ON con.condition_start_datetime > de.last_end_datetime WHERE con.person_id = 131321462355119848 AND con.condition_concept_id = 4294192 ORDER BY con.condition_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT tc.condition_status_source_value FROM target_condition AS tc;

input: Name the top five specimens tested in the same month after patients have undergone a <PROCEDURE>2721154</PROCEDURE> procedure during hospitalization.
output: SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS specimen_count FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON po.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id JOIN specimen AS s ON s.person_id = po.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime >= po.procedure_datetime AND DATE_TRUNC('month', s.specimen_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', po.procedure_date) JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 2721154 AND vo.visit_type_concept_id = 32220 GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY specimen_count DESC LIMIT 5;

input: Which procedures are most common (top 10) among patients in their 80s during their first hospital admission?
output: WITH first_visits AS (SELECT vo.person_id, MIN(vo.visit_occurrence_id) AS first_visit_id, MIN(vo.visit_start_date) AS first_visit_date FROM visit_occurrence AS vo GROUP BY vo.person_id), patients_80s AS (SELECT fv.first_visit_id, fv.first_visit_date FROM first_visits AS fv JOIN person AS p ON fv.person_id = p.person_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(fv.first_visit_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 80 AND 89), procedures_80s AS (SELECT pr.procedure_concept_id FROM procedure_occurrence AS pr JOIN patients_80s AS p80 ON pr.visit_occurrence_id = p80.first_visit_id) SELECT c.concept_name, p.procedure_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS procedure_count FROM procedures_80s AS p JOIN concept AS c ON p.procedure_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY p.procedure_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY procedure_count DESC LIMIT 10;

input: Catalog the devices that were in use for over 14 days and deactivated today for individuals in <CAREUNIT>38004269</CAREUNIT> care unit.
output: SELECT vd.person_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS device_count FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN device_exposure AS de ON vd.visit_detail_id = de.visit_detail_id JOIN concept AS c ON de.device_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.visit_detail_concept_id = 38004269 AND vd.visit_detail_type_concept_id = 32220 AND de.device_exposure_end_date = CURRENT_DATE AND de.device_exposure_end_datetime - de.device_exposure_start_datetime > INTERVAL '14 days' GROUP BY vd.person_id, c.concept_name;

output: SELECT vd.person_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS device_count FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN device_exposure AS de ON vd.visit_detail_id = de.visit_detail_id JOIN concept AS c ON de.device_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.visit_detail_concept_id = 38004269 AND vd.visit_detail_type_concept_id = 32220 AND de.device_exposure_end_date = CURRENT_DATE AND de.device_exposure_end_datetime - de.device_exposure_start_datetime > INTERVAL '14 days' GROUP BY vd.person_id, c.concept_name;

input: Mention the devices that were discontinued today after more than 14 days of use for patients in <CAREUNIT>38004269</CAREUNIT> care unit.
output: SELECT vd.person_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS device_count FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN device_exposure AS de ON vd.visit_detail_id = de.visit_detail_id JOIN concept AS c ON de.device_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.visit_detail_concept_id = 38004269 AND vd.visit_detail_type_concept_id = 32220 AND de.device_exposure_end_date = CURRENT_DATE AND de.device_exposure_end_datetime - de.device_exposure_start_datetime > INTERVAL '14 days' GROUP BY vd.person_id, c.concept_name;
